channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in TypeScript (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in TypeScript nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🟦 langchain-ai/openwiki (12178 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: langchain-ai

📝 Repository: langchain-ai/openwiki

📄 Descrizione: OpenWiki is a CLI that writes and maintains agent documentation for your codebase.

📜 Licenza: MIT License

]]>

item.title: 🟦 tigicion/dao-code (1610 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: tigicion

📝 Repository: tigicion/dao-code

📄 Descrizione: Open-source TypeScript terminal coding agent for DeepSeek-V4 — builds on DeepSeek's strong price-performance and ultra-cheap cache pricing, engineering byte-stable prefixes and cache-reusing forks so cross-session memory and a continuous self-correction layer add almost no token cost; 1M context, Skills/MCP/Hooks, Claude Code config compatible.

⭐ Stelle: 1610

🍴 Forks: 54

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-agent cli coding-agent deepseek llm terminal typescript

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-08T08:10:42Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-07T01:54:04Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🟦 jangles-byte/Pythia (531 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jangles-byte

📝 Repository: jangles-byte/Pythia

📄 Descrizione: One local API call gives your agent the entire live state of the planet — every major world event at once, plus forecasts. 40+ free keyless feeds, runs entirely on Ollama. No cloud, no cost. Keyless live feeds into one global view and forecasts what’s likely next. No cloud, no keys, no cost. 1d,1w,1m,1y predictions by Mirofish.
